title: CIE Analysis Plan (Statistics Agent output)
description: Output of the Statistics Agent: the selected method(s), analysis plan, an executable R script generated by the LLM (grounded in the knowledge reference library), and the specification. Internal artifact chained forward via accumulated_context, so validation asserts shape but permits additional fields.

r_script.description: Executable R source generated by the LLM, or null when no LLM client was available (specification-only fallback).

r_script_provenance.description: How the R script was produced: whether it was LLM-generated, which knowledge references grounded it, and whether it came from cache.

analysis_proposal.description: Conversational-mode output (Workbench): a natural-language explanation plus one or more selectable R code candidates, produced instead of a single silently-chosen r_script.

explanation_markdown.description: Natural-language explanation of the recommended method(s), assumptions, and interpretation guidance.
